failures.description: The agent made a malformed ProductCatalogSearch call: it omitted the required item_id and supplied product_id as integer 0 instead of the provided string product_id 1968349452.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The correct goal was to retrieve the price for item 2177997696 using ProductCatalogSearch with the available item_id and product_id. The tool invocation used {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and using a non-string, wrong product_id. The runtime explicitly rejected this with a SchemaError requiring string product_id and item_id.
